title: Google's AI Health Coach asks for your sleep data and $9.99
desc: Daily AI news satire. Google turns Fitbit into Google Health, launches a Gemini-powered coach behind a $9.99/mo gate. Not for medical purposes.

beats.name: temple-cold-open
beats.narration: Google is turning Fitbit into Google Health.

beats.name: pichai-reveals-wrist-pebble
beats.narration: The new Fitbit Air is a tiny screenless tracker built for the AI coach.

beats.name: fitbit-app-becomes-google-health
beats.narration: The app update starts rolling out on May nineteenth.

beats.name: gemini-coach-materializes
beats.narration: The coach is built with Gemini and covers fitness, sleep, and wellness.

beats.name: onboarding-scroll-interrogation
beats.narration: First, it asks about your goals, routine, equipment, injuries, and lifestyle.

beats.name: data-river-enters-oracle
beats.narration: Then it can connect fitness, sleep, nutrition, environment, and medical record context.

beats.name: voice-photo-document-logging
beats.narration: Google says users can log workouts, meals, photos, documents, and records by talking to it.

beats.name: subscription-toll-gate
beats.narration: The enlightenment tier costs nine ninety-nine a month.

beats.name: pixel-fitbit-first-line
beats.narration: It launches first for eligible Fitbit and Pixel Watch users.

beats.name: not-medical-purpose-stamp
beats.narration: Google also says it is not intended for medical purposes.

beats.name: weekly-plan-training-yard
beats.narration: The coach can build weekly plans and suggest what to focus on next.

beats.name: final-payment-method-zen
beats.narration: Finally, wellness becomes personal, proactive, and subject to checking responses for accuracy.

sources.fact: TechCrunch - Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
Google Keyword - Google Health Coach is becoming globally available
Google Keyword - Introducing the all-new Fitbit Air

transcript: Google is turning Fitbit into Google Health. The new Fitbit Air is a tiny screenless tracker built for the AI coach. The app update starts rolling out on May nineteenth. The coach is built with Gemini and covers fitness, sleep, and wellness. First, it asks about your goals, routine, equipment, injuries, and lifestyle. Then it can connect fitness, sleep, nutrition, environment, and medical record context. Google says users can log workouts, meals, photos, documents, and records by talking to it. The enlightenment tier costs nine ninety-nine a month. It launches first for eligible Fitbit and Pixel Watch users. Google also says it is not intended for medical purposes. The coach can build weekly plans and suggest what to focus on next. Finally, wellness becomes personal, proactive, and subject to checking responses for accuracy.

writing.author: Claude
writing.role: script · beat plan · narration · sources audit
